system.effect: The psyker uses controlled pyromanctic flame to seal wounds and purge infection. The target heals 1d5 wounds. If the target is suffering from Blood Loss, this condition is removed.

description.value: The psyker channels a precise, controlled flame through his hands, cauterising wounds and sealing torn flesh. The target heals 1d5 wounds and any Blood Loss condition is removed. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the target heals an additional 1d5 wounds.
